title: The Homology Cliff in Frozen Protein Language Models: Research Compendium
description: Five-paper research compendium on a systematic failure mode of ESM-2 biosecurity retrieval. Contains 9,360 pre-registered per-cell .npz results with SHA256 manifest, four pre-registered rescue attempts (Mahalanobis, Fisher-Rao, stratified cascade, Mapper-augmentation, all rejected at H1), one supervised linear-projection rescue that improves distant-stratum F1 by ~47% relative at the largest scale, calibration collapse analysis (ECE 0.069 -> 0.294 close-to-distant), and Pfam cross-family topology analysis showing 20-of-20 evaluable distant false alarms are cross-family. Methods paper documents the SHA256-locked pre-registration pattern and seed-variance gate. All claims traceable to committed evidence via MANIFEST.sha256.json.
